marine debris.recommendation: Document debris location and recommend cleanup.

plastic.recommendation: Plastic waste threatens marine life through ingestion and entanglement.

ghost net.recommendation: Fishing nets can entangle turtles, sharks and marine mammals.

sediment plume.recommendation: Reduced visibility may affect coral health.

strong current.recommendation: Reduce AUV speed and monitor navigation.

dense coral.recommendation: Navigate carefully to avoid reef damage.

shipwreck.recommendation: Interesting archaeological feature; maintain safe clearance.

underwater ruins.recommendation: Possible archaeological site. Recommend human review.
